title: Design and implement optional DMS connector interface
requirements: Define DMS connector interface without requiring a specific DMS product.
Prefer CMIS, then vendor REST API, then SharePoint/Microsoft Graph delta, then approved read-only SQL bridge, then export folder fallback.
Treat DMS as source of truth for registered document identity, versions, workflow statuses and legal retention.
Support DMS-to-email/file dedup through content and semantic fingerprints.
Do not bypass document ingestion DLP/parser policies.
